assertions.assertion: Calls AddJwtBearer with Authority set to 'https://identity.example.com'
assertions.rationale: Standard ASP.NET Core JWT bearer setup is well-known.
Setting Audience is a common pattern.

assertions.assertion: Sets TokenValidationParameters.ValidTypes to include 'at+jwt' to prevent JWT confusion attacks
assertions.rationale: ValidTypes = ["at+jwt"] is a Duende-specific best practice not in general JWT bearer docs.

assertions.assertion: Includes UseAuthentication() before UseAuthorization() in the middleware pipeline

assertions.rationale: Standard Microsoft package for JWT bearer auth.
